name: Helloworld Travel Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5400, stop A$1.3266, target A$1.8471 (1.44:1) — then trail it.
